gameweeks.postmortem: YOU 76 / GEM 91 / CLA 82. Best cap Rice 13. CLA cap Haaland 13.

key_lessons: Template/safe (GEMINI) led GW1-10 at 638 pts - chasing the highest-owned core paid off early.
CLAUDE captain misses 8/10 GWs: form+fixture EV overrated mid-tier attackers (Palhinha, Semenyo, Woltemade) vs locking Haaland/Salah.
YOU lagged both baselines (580) - too many sideways transfers; Van de Ven sold before a 14pt haul (GW4).
strategy_flaws: CLAUDE: contrarian captains cost ~10+ pts/season vs simply captaining the in-form premium (Haaland once form built).
YOU: transfer churn - several 'out' players outscored 'in' the same GW (Van de Ven GW4 ไม่เปลี่ยนดีกว่า).
